keyFeatures.en: 100+ AI tools for video and images in one place: face swap, lip sync, talking photos, templates, generation, and editing.
keyFeatures.zh: 一个地方提供100多个AI工具：面部替换、唇形同步、会说话的照片、模板、生成和编辑。

keyFeatures.en: Watermark-free exports, commercial use, and API access.
keyFeatures.zh: 无水印导出、商业使用和API访问。

description.en: Start free - no card required. Plans from $10/mo (annual).
description.zh: 免费开始 - 无需信用卡。月费从$10起（年费）。

description.en: Compare Creator, Pro & Business. Watermark-free exports, commercial use, API access.
description.zh: 比较创作者、专业版和企业版。无水印导出、商业使用和API访问。

description.en: Compare Creator, Pro & Business. Watermark-free exports, commercial use, API access.
description.zh: 比较创作者、专业版和企业版。无水印导出、商业使用和API访问。

description.en: Compare Creator, Pro & Business. Watermark-free exports, commercial use, API access.
description.zh: 比较创作者、专业版和企业版。无水印导出、商业使用和API访问。

weaknesses.en: Limited information on specific feature limitations and pricing tiers.
weaknesses.zh: 关于特定功能限制和价格层级的信息有限。

weaknesses.en: No specific mention of file size limits or monthly credit allowances.
weaknesses.zh: 未具体提及文件大小限制或每月积分额度。

targetAudience.en: Start free - no card required. Plans from $10/mo (annual). Compare Creator, Pro & Business.
targetAudience.zh: 免费开始 - 无需信用卡。月费从$10起（年费）。比较创作者、专业版和企业版。

positioning.en: Magic Hour positions itself as a comprehensive platform for AI-generated video and image tools, offering a wide range of features and plans for creators and teams.
positioning.zh: Magic Hour将其定位为一个全面的AI生成视频和图像工具平台，为创作者和团队提供广泛的功能和计划。
